# researchPapers

> Academic paper platform over a high-citation OpenAlex CS corpus — search, analytics, and RAG demo (~488k papers).

## Product

- [Home](https://papers.highsignal.app/): Search and analytics

## Machine surfaces

- [Agent catalog](https://papers.highsignal.app/api/ai): JSON inventory of public surfaces
- [Homepage markdown](https://papers.highsignal.app/index.md): Product brief without JS
- [This index](https://papers.highsignal.app/llms.txt)

## Optional

- [Foundry](https://sassmaker.com): Parent fleet showcase
